stemHtml: What is the correct way to transmit the wind vector and speed "170 degrees, 18 knots, gusting 30 knots" in radiotelephony?

options.a: Wind one seven zero degrees one eight knots gusting three zero knots.
options.b: Wind one hundred and seventy degrees eighteen knots gusting thirty knots.
options.c: Wind one hundred and seventy degrees one eight knots gusting three zero knots.
options.d: Wind one seven zero degrees eighteen knots gusting maximum thirty knots.
